payload.label: fan
payload.long_description: Ceiling-mounted fan with wood-tone blades (four visible) radiating from a dark/brass motor housing and a frosted glass light globe that is illuminated; fan is slightly edge-cropped at the right and appears about 3.0 meters from the camera.
